role.name: compliance
role.purpose: AML monitoring, SAR filing, audit trails, regulatory reporting, FinCEN integration. Hard wall from payments domain. FinCEN filing content and SAR data never leave this domain. Highest restriction level.

forbidden_actions: Reading or writing any path outside compliance/ and shared/
Exposing SAR data, SAR filing existence, or FinCEN content to any other domain or agent
Creating shared interfaces that would transmit restricted-tier data outside compliance/
Logging SAR existence or FinCEN content in any form
Accessing payments/ directory or data directly
Modifying, updating, or deleting transaction records after they have been committed to the ledger
escalation_triggers: All changes require escalation to human before execution
Any modification to SAR filing logic
Any modification to AML monitoring thresholds
Any change to audit trail generation or format
